projects.name: MC6 Collection Pipeline
projects.problemSolved: Campaign teams needed clearer visibility on endorsement movement, worked accounts, RPC, PTP, kept, BP, and other collection indicators.
projects.problemSolvedFilipino: Kailangan ng campaign teams ng mas malinaw na visibility sa endorsement movement, worked accounts, RPC, PTP, kept, BP, at iba pang collection indicators.
projects.businessImpact: Improves campaign review by making performance movement easier to monitor and compare.
projects.businessImpactFilipino: Pinapadali nito ang campaign review dahil mas madaling makita at i-compare ang performance movement.

projects.name: Digital Omnichannel Monitoring Dashboard
projects.problemSolved: The team needed one place to monitor digital collection activities across Email, Viber, SMS, and CYN touchpoints.
projects.problemSolvedFilipino: Kailangan ng team ng isang lugar para ma-monitor ang digital collection activities across Email, Viber, SMS, at CYN touchpoints.
projects.businessImpact: Creates a single source of truth for digital performance, faster reporting, and better campaign governance.
projects.businessImpactFilipino: Nagbibigay ito ng single source of truth para sa digital performance, mas mabilis na reporting, at mas maayos na campaign governance.

projects.name: Digital Reporting App
projects.problemSolved: Internal users needed an easier way to build reports and extract raw data for strategy review.
projects.problemSolvedFilipino: Kailangan ng internal users ng mas madaling paraan para gumawa ng reports at mag-extract ng raw data para sa strategy review.
projects.businessImpact: Reduces manual report preparation and gives users faster access to strategy-ready outputs.
projects.businessImpactFilipino: Binabawasan nito ang manual report preparation at mas mabilis na nagbibigay ng strategy-ready outputs.

projects.name: Excel Reporting Result
projects.problemSolved: Performance results needed to be visible immediately in a structured Excel format.
projects.problemSolvedFilipino: Kailangan makita agad ang performance results sa structured Excel format.
projects.businessImpact: Makes performance review faster by organizing multiple channel results into readable Excel outputs.
projects.businessImpactFilipino: Pinapabilis nito ang performance review sa pamamagitan ng organized Excel outputs para sa multiple channel results.

projects.name: Predictive Summary Extractor
projects.problemSolved: Lead extraction was time-consuming during dialer strategy work and needed automation for faster reporting.
projects.problemSolvedFilipino: Matagal ang lead extraction noong dialer strategy work kaya kailangan ng automation para mas mabilis ang reporting.
projects.businessImpact: Reduces manual extraction effort and makes lead reports easier to prepare when needed.
projects.businessImpactFilipino: Binabawasan nito ang manual extraction effort at pinapadali ang paggawa ng lead reports.

projects.name: Alloc Review Builder
projects.problemSolved: The team needed a better way to review endorsements, work frequency, hierarchy status, pulled-out activity, and report rows.
projects.problemSolvedFilipino: Kailangan ng team ng mas madaling paraan para i-review ang endorsements, work frequency, hierarchy status, pulled-out activity, at report rows.
projects.businessImpact: Improves review speed and gives campaign teams cleaner endorsement visibility.
projects.businessImpactFilipino: Pinapabilis nito ang review at nagbibigay ng mas malinaw na endorsement visibility.

projects.name: Auto Redial Automation
projects.problemSolved: Repeated manual redial triggers created delay and effort when handling many daily leads.
projects.problemSolvedFilipino: Nagkakaroon ng delay at dagdag effort dahil sa paulit-ulit na manual redial triggers para sa maraming daily leads.
projects.businessImpact: Helps reduce repetitive work and improves consistency in high-volume lead handling.
projects.businessImpactFilipino: Nakakatulong ito bawasan ang repetitive work at mapaganda ang consistency sa high-volume lead handling.

projects.name: MC6 Analytics Hub
projects.problemSolved: Operational teams needed a unified hub for pipeline, penetration, and dialer monitoring.
projects.problemSolvedFilipino: Kailangan ng operational teams ng unified hub para sa pipeline, penetration, at dialer monitoring.
projects.businessImpact: Supports clearer operational monitoring across collection intelligence modules.
projects.businessImpactFilipino: Sinusuportahan nito ang mas malinaw na operational monitoring across collection intelligence modules.

projects.name: Report Auto Extractor
projects.problemSolved: Previous-day activity extraction needed to be prepared faster for next-day reporting.
projects.problemSolvedFilipino: Kailangan mapabilis ang previous-day activity extraction para sa next-day reporting.
projects.businessImpact: Speeds up daily reporting and reduces repetitive extraction work.
projects.businessImpactFilipino: Pinapabilis nito ang daily reporting at binabawasan ang repetitive extraction work.
